Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. As to first cause of action for fraud, plaintiff must allege each element with particularity, and which alleged representations were false. As to the third cause of action, plaintiff must allege facts that show defendant did not have any intent to actually perform the advertised services, or that defendant promised to perform the services in a certain way or by a certain time. As to the fourth cause of action for rescission, contradictory language indicates defendant had no intention of providing any of the services he promised, but plaintiff admits defendant did perform at least some of the services promised. Plaintiff has not sufficiently alleged failure of consideration. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
